title: lora_l2.c: memcpy used without string.h include
description:
firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c uses memcpy at lines 75 and 265 but does not include <string.h>. Currently compiles because <zephyr/kernel.h> transitively includes it, but relying on transitive includes violates header self-containment. If Zephyr's internal include structure changes, this file will fail to compile.

Add: #include <string.h>
